title: Automate M365 to Google Workspace Migrations with ADK multi-agents
summary: Google Cloud Tech demonstrates how to build an AI-powered multi-agent system using the Agent Development Kit (ADK) to automate Microsoft 365 to Google Workspace migrations. The tutorial covers multi-agent orchestration with SequentialAgent, self-correcting loops with LoopAgent, context caching, and deployment to Google Agent Engine with a single CLI command.
